title: How to remove _GEN wires?
body:
Here is a mux example. firtool generates some **_GEN_** wires as there are multiple callings.
![image](https://github.com/llvm/circt/assets/13931204/9664cabf-9482-416d-a6f9-a354c9a986ed)

But I would like to inline those GEN wires into the mux line just like the following code.

![image](https://github.com/llvm/circt/assets/13931204/66351dc7-6781-443d-a068-45bf1f81d4ed)

I tried to enable `--disable-opt` option. This option indeed can put GEN wires into the mux line, but this `--disable-opt` also can disable other optimization which is not expected.

![image](https://github.com/llvm/circt/assets/13931204/71f4b47b-f519-4fbd-a4f1-8265b29a4039)

Is it possible to just disable this small(not liked) optimization and keep other optimization?
